name: polymath-connector-notion
description: Notion connector: MCP for database/page reads + writes + sync-doc-to-notion skill that mirrors local Markdown artifacts into a Notion page tree.

notionToken.title: Notion integration secret
notionToken.description: From Notion → Settings → Integrations. Issue an internal integration and share specific pages with it.

notionRootPageId.title: Default root page ID
notionRootPageId.description: Page ID under which synced artifacts are created. Must already be shared with the integration.
